posts.author: alenka (Alenka)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Complex formula improvements (character limitation)

What are you trying to achieve

On behalf of my client, I would like to submit a feature request regarding the Formula Column/Builder.

Increased Character Limit: My client frequently works with complex formulas that exceed the current character limit. They would like to request increasing the Formula Builder’s character capacity to 10,000 characters to better accommodate these advanced formulas.

Resizable Formula Builder Window: The current Formula Builder window is quite small, which makes navigating and editing long formulas challenging. A resizable window would greatly improve usability and reduce errors.

Search Functionality Within the Formula Builder: To further enhance efficiency, a search feature inside the Formula Builder would be very helpful, allowing users to quickly locate specific parts of their formulas.

These improvements would significantly enhance the user experience for teams relying on advanced formulas for their workflows.

Thank you for considering these suggestions, and please let me know if
